name: What's my on-the-job injury case worth in Boise Idaho?
description: Medical + 2/3 wages; depends on disability and income.[9]

mainEntity.name: What's my on-the-job injury case worth in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 2/3 wages; depends on disability and income.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Idaho workers comp covers medical, 2/3 wages up to max, plus permanency if applicable.[9] Context: Values based on lost income, disability rating; no pain damages vs employer.[9] Key factors: Wage history; impairment percentage; future earning loss. Practical guidance: Use comp calculator tools; negotiate settlement. Values vary widely. Attorney maximizes value.
